parameters.content:
## 📚 Article Processor

**Schedule:** 8:00 AM and 7:00 PM daily
**Source:** `00_Inbox/articles-to-process.md` in MinIO
**Output:** Article notes filed to domain folders; action items as task files; queue cleared

### URL Format in articles-to-process.md
```
https://example.com/article — Optional context note
https://another.com/post
```

### Setup
- MinIO credential `MinIO S3` must exist
- OpenRouter API credential must exist (free tier at openrouter.ai)
- `articles-to-process.md` must exist in MinIO at the path above

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.userMessage }], temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 2000 }) }}

// Return to loop for next URL
return [{ json: $input.first().json }];
